generated_oml:
// (New instances required for reference resolution)

instance DecisionSupportEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that bridges data to DecisionSupportService."
    DTDFVocab:enables DecisionSupportService
]

instance ModelDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that handles deployment of models into the runtime environment."
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that validates model fidelity using ODTE metrics."
]

instance EnergyUsageLineChart : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time line chart visualizing energy consumption."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from building simulation outcomes."
]

instance SceneInteractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about user interaction within the 3D scene."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance SmartLightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting control system that receives brightness setpoints and command states via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware and drives LED fixtures within the living lab building."
]

instance HVACDamperControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC damper actuator that adjusts airflow based on temperature setpoints and occupancy status, communicated through Hono/Ditto and controlled by the building’s BMS."
]

instance MultiZoneLightingControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Zone‑based lighting controller that aggregates lighting level data from area sensors and applies adaptive lighting schedules using reinforcement‑learning policies."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Infrared occupancy sensor placed at zone entries, reporting presence counts and dwell times via MQTT over Hono to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyReadingTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "T\203F‑rated temperature sensor network embedded in HVAC vents and room surfaces, sending ambient temperature readings every 30 s."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureReadingTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lux meter located above workstations, monitoring illumination levels to inform adaptive lighting control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelReadingTransmitted
]

instance HVACStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Airflow and pressure sensor integrated into HVAC ducts, transmitting damper status and airflow rates."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HVACStatusReadingTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance OccupancyReadingTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureReadingTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingLevelReadingTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance HVACStatusReadingTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HVACStatusSensor
]

// C7: Virtual data representation
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Numerical occupancy count per zone, derived from OccupancyReadingTransmitted and timestamped for trend analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyReadingTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, LightingOptimizationEnabler, DecisionSupportEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature values per room, sourced from TemperatureReadingTransmitted for HVAC control and predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureReadingTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler, HVACTuningEnabler, DecisionSupportEnabler
]

instance LightingLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current illumination levels per area, used for real‑time visualisation and reinforcement‑learning schedule optimisation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelReadingTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler, DecisionSupportEnabler
]

instance HVACStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "HVAC interface status, airflow, and pressure metrics, critical for real‑time monitoring and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HVACStatusReadingTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, HVACTuningEnabler, DecisionSupportEnabler
]

// C10: Models and Data
instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity IFC model of the living lab building with extended annotations for sensor and actuator metadata extracted from Revit."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BDEExtractionEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Controller logic model detailing rule‑based HVAC and lighting control algorithms published to Ditto for runtime enforcement."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngineSceneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 scene representation of the building interior for interactive 3D visualization and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ThermalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Finite‑element thermal simulation model of the building used to validate HVAC performance predictions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance model for HVAC and lighting components, trained on historical sensor data via reinforcement‑learning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware instance that manages device connectivity and telemetry ingestion for the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard, EnergySavingOptimizationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto instance that stores device twin states, enables configuration updates, and exposes twin APIs."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard, DecisionSupportService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 runtime that renders the digital twin’s 3‑D scene and processes user interactions."
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BDEExtractionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven extraction tool that converts BIM IFC annotations into runtime interface definitions for sensors and actuators."

]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Analytics engine that performs real‑time predictive modeling of energy usage and building performance."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService, EnergySavingOptimizationService
]

instance LightingOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization engine that computes adaptive lighting schedules based on occupancy and illumination data."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergySavingOptimizationService
]

instance HVACTuningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "HVAC tuning engine that adjusts setpoints for temperature and airflow based on sensor feedback."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergySavingOptimizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning platform that adapts control policies for lighting and HVAC to maximize energy savings."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergySavingOptimizationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ODTEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard that visualises real‑time building telemetry from Hono/Ditto and provides live insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyTrendInsight, EnergyUsageLineChart
]

instance EnergySavingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimisation service that calculates and applies lighting and HVAC schedules to reduce energy consumption while maintaining comfort."

]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

// C17: Insights/Actions

    base:desc "Insight recommending lighting schedule adjustments and HVAC setpoint tweaks to achieve the lowest energy consumption while keeping occupants comfortable."
]

]

instance OccupancyTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

]

]

instance AdjustHVACScheduleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

]

    base:desc "Automatic creation of maintenance work orders in facility management system when a predictive alert triggers."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SmartLightingControlActuator, HVACDamperControlActuator, MultiZoneLightingControllerActuator,
              OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LightingLevelSensor, HVACStatusSensor,
              BIMIFCModel, ControlLogicModel, UnrealEngineSceneModel, ThermalSimulationModel,

// C15: Components
instance BuildingStructureComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building envelope and structural elements represented in the BIM IFC model."
]

instance BuildingControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Integrated building automation system encompassing HVAC, lighting, and sensor networks connected via Hono/Ditto."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the twin (e.g., lighting level adjustments, HVAC set‑point changes) are sent via Ditto to the physical devices through Hono, enabling bidirectional synchronization and runtime control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, near‑real‑time synchronization (seconds to milliseconds) for sensor data and control messages, with model transformation and deployment steps occurring offline or in staged releases."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated system comprising the BIM model as the semantic backbone, the Hono/Ditto middleware bridge between PT and DT, the Twin Engine that hosts runtime models, the visualization environment (Unreal), and auxiliary services for analytics/optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed (static BIM), Manufactured (construction data integrated into the model), Operated (runtime data and control), and Evolved (continuous improvement via RL, model updates)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Use of the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to quantify alignment between PT and DT; validation of data streams against model predictions; attention to semantic drift and sensor uncertainties; formal verification of control logic where applicable."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical–digital communication uses Eclipse Hono as the MQTT gateway; Ditto twin registry stores state; messages are JSON over MQTT topics identified by tenant and device IDs; the system supports publish/subscribe semantics."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly specified; typically the building owner holds ownership of physical data, while the DT service provider manages the telemetry within agreed privacy and security contracts."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to BIM semantics and Model‑Driven Engineering standards; it integrates with recognized AECO practices for data modeling though no specific ISO or building code standard is cited."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Not fully addressed in the document; however, the middleware (Hono/Ditto) supports authentication and encryption, and the architecture is designed to avoid unsafe remote execution on the PT by enforcing control policies and safety checks."
]
